name: /audit-pack output includes a Decision Trail section enumerating all ADRs and their commits
command: mkdir -p docs/adr compliance && printf '# 0001 First\n' > docs/adr/0001-first.md && : > compliance/audit.log && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --audit-log compliance/audit.log --adr-dir docs/adr --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'section: Decision Trail' out.txt && grep -q '0001-first' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
